title: Sinclair Pop Mechanics interview consolidates epigenetic age-reversal thesis ahead of Life Bio ER-100 Phase 1 readout
description: David Sinclair's wide-ranging Pop Mechanics interview reaffirms his Information Theory of Aging — the operating system, not the hardware, drives decline — and disclosed he is launching a company to commercialize an affordable consumer biological-age test. The piece coincides with Life Biosciences' ER-100 glaucoma Phase 1 dosing and consolidates partial epigenetic reprogramming as the dominant scientific narrative entering 2H 2026.

title: SciTechDaily / Aging-US: 'Precision geroprotection' formally reframes senolytic strategy
description: An Aging-US review titled 'Cellular senescence: from pathogenic mechanisms to precision anti-aging interventions' (Deng et al., 4 May 2026) formalizes 'precision geroprotection' — targeting only pathogenic senescent populations while preserving beneficial ones. This consolidates 2026's industry-wide pivot from broad zombie-cell clearance to indication-specific senolytics (Rubedo RLS-1496 dermatology, Mayo SENSURV, BioAge BGE-102, ABT-263 wound healing).

title: RTÉ: cellular reprogramming, Nanotics nanoparticle clearance, trophoblast stem cells projected to enter human trials in 3-5 years
description: RTÉ's Longevity Summit Trinity Dublin recap maps three converging modalities expected to reach human trials within 3-5 years: cellular reprogramming (Life Biosciences ER-100 first-in-class), nanoparticle clearance (Nanotics absorptive nanoparticles 18 months to clinic), and trophoblast stem cell treatments. Mainstream coverage in major European outlets signals the field's continued mainstream legitimacy.

title: China CBE 2026: longevity reframes mainstream cosmetic industry around mitochondrial and cellular intervention
description: Kline Group CBE 2026 trends report finds China's beauty industry has shifted away from traditional anti-aging toward cellular-level intervention at the mitochondrial and genetic level — with Kerton Laser, DJM, and Meice bridging AI diagnostics to clinical settings. The pivot parallels Florida's clinic build-out and Elysium TELI launch, formalizing longevity as the organizing paradigm for the global cosmetic and wellness industry.

title: Putin's $26B Russia longevity push consolidates geopolitical positioning of longevity
description: Continued coverage of WSJ's Putin $26B Russia longevity initiative — state gene-therapy aging-slowdown, bioprinted human tissue, and mini-pig organ transplants by 2030 — alongside Hevolution's Saudi public capital and US private VC ($120B+ deployable across 7 active funds) crystallizes longevity as a 3-pole geopolitical competition heading into ASCO and AGE 2026.

title: David Sinclair: Your Body Can Beat Death, Says One Harvard Scientist
description: Sinclair details Information Theory of Aging — aging as epigenome malfunction not DNA damage — and confirms he is launching a company to develop an affordable consumer biological-age test; parallel to Insilico's Zhavoronkov and Elysium Index efforts.

title: Some 'Zombie Cells' May Actually Help You Live Longer — Aging-US review
description: Aging-US review (Deng et al., DOI 10.18632/aging.206375) introduces 'precision geroprotection' — targeting pathogenic senescent populations while preserving beneficial ones supporting tissue maintenance and repair; consolidates 2026 senolytic industry pivot.

title: RTÉ: Longevity — is it possible to reprogramme your body as you age?
description: RTÉ Longevity Summit Trinity Dublin recap details three modalities reaching human trials within 3-5 years: cellular reprogramming (Life Biosciences ER-100), Nanotics absorptive nanoparticle clearance (18 months to clinic), trophoblast stem cell treatments.

title: China Beauty Trends CBE 2026: Longevity, Biotech & Skin Care
description: CBE 2026 finds China beauty industry shifting from traditional anti-aging to cellular-level intervention at mitochondrial/genetic level; Kerton Laser, DJM, Meice bridging AI diagnostics to clinical settings.

title: Putin's $26 Billion Longevity Push
description: Russia announces $26B state-funded longevity initiative championed by Putin — gene therapy to slow cellular aging, bioprinted human tissue, mini-pig organ transplants by 2030; first state-actor capital deployment at this scale.

title: Fight Aging weekly: astrocyte aging dual interventions detailed (HDAC inhibitor + Hevin gene therapy)
description: Fight Aging review consolidates two complementary astrocyte-aging approaches: HDAC inhibitor reducing inflammatory overactivation and Hevin-restoring gene therapy improving synaptic function — completing the dementia geroscience tri-cell axis with microglial senescence and GZMK CD8+ T cells.

title: Fight Aging: Aged circulating CD8+ T cells and GZMK drive hippocampal cognitive decline
description: Aged circulating CD8+ T cells and their secreted GZMK drive hippocampal aging signatures and cognitive decline; blocking T cell activation or systemic GZMK improves cognition in mice — formalizing a druggable immune-brain-aging axis.

title: Fight Aging: Repair Biotechnologies REP-0004 mRNA-LNP atherosclerosis-reversal candidate detailed
description: REP-0004 mRNA lipid-nanoparticle therapy designed to break down intracellular free cholesterol in liver, regress atherosclerotic plaque, and reverse liver disease — second damage-clearance modality alongside Cyclarity UDP-003.

title: Fight Aging: Hallmarks of Aging now the field's dominant organizing framework
description: Philosophy-of-science perspective argues the Hallmarks of Aging framework has stabilized geroscience methods, data, and scientific communities despite ongoing theoretical disagreement on aging's root cause.

title: Elysium Health launches TELI physician-led longevity institute
description: Elysium Health launched The Elysium Longevity Institute (TELI) — physician-led longevity program with NAD+ science core; CMO Omar Baker MD + chief scientist Lenny Guarente; initial enrollment 10,000; Q3 2026 launch.

title: BioWorld ARDD 2025 recap: in vivo rejuvenation pivots from reset to 'rewind'
description: ARDD 2025 conference recap documents shift from full Yamanaka 'reset' to partial-reprogramming 'rewind' strategies — consistent with Life Biosciences ER-100 and Daewoong-Turn Bio acquisition.

title: Cure.com: 7 VCs Funding Longevity Startups in 2026
description: Khosla Ventures, Apollo Health Ventures, Longevity Vision Holding, LongeVC ($35M+$120M funds), Obvious Ventures, age1, a16z Bio identified as the seven most active longevity VCs; market projected at $67.03B by 2035.

title: Bar-Ilan / NIA / Tel Aviv: SIRT6 chromatin age-reversal in old mouse livers
description: Nature Communications paper from Cohen lab + NIA + Tel Aviv shows SIRT6 overexpression in old mice reverses age-related chromatin accessibility changes and inflammation in liver; SirTLab pursuing therapeutic translation.

title: Rapamycin News: Comprehensive meta-analysis of interventions in next-gen epigenetic clocks
description: Meta-analysis: FTC/TAF -6.33y PhenoAge, omega-3 -6.1y DamAge, semaglutide -4.9y PhenoAge / -9% DunedinPACE, ketamine -1.81y OMICmAge; nicotinamide riboside, rapamycin, D+Q/fisetin senolytics show no significant signal.

title: AGE 2026 Session 4: Junevity siRNA reprogramming + Rubedo GPX4 senolytic Phase 1 + BioAge Morgen
description: AGE 2026 Session 4 reveals translational pipeline: A4LI policy, Junevity siRNA reprogramming, BioAge Morgen, Rubedo GPX4-modulating selective senolytic in Phase 1 for inflammatory/aging skin — GPX4 confirmed as new precision-senolytic axis.

title: ABT-263 topical senolytic improves wound healing in older skin
description: Topical ABT-263 (Bcl-2/Bcl-xL inhibitor) dramatically improves wound healing in older skin by clearing senescent fibroblasts; viral distribution this week reinforces dermatology as near-term precision-senolytic indication.

title: Daewoong acquires Turn Bio partial-reprogramming platform
description: Korean pharma Daewoong acquired Turn Biotechnologies' partial-epigenetic-reprogramming platform — Asia's first major M&A move into OSK reprogramming.

title: Tau-targeting drug slows early Alzheimer's progression
description: New tau-targeting therapy reports clinically meaningful slowing of early Alzheimer's progression, extending neurodegeneration pipeline beyond amyloid.

title: Alzinova advances ALZ-101 vaccine to Phase 2
description: Alzinova advanced ALZ-101 Alzheimer's vaccine to Phase 2 trial following positive Phase 1 safety results, adding active-immunization approach to neurodegeneration aging pipeline.

title: Scribe Therapeutics tests epigenetic treatment to lower cholesterol without altering DNA
description: Scribe Therapeutics testing epigenetic editing approach to durably lower cholesterol without altering DNA sequence; joins Eli Lilly gene-editing and Repair Biotechnologies REP-0004 in cardiovascular-aging therapeutic convergence.

title: Insilico + Human Longevity AI longevity foundation model collaboration
description: Insilico Medicine and Human Life Foundation Models (HLI subsidiary) signed multi-million-dollar collaboration to build industry-first AI foundation models for longevity science.

title: Tyshkovskiy/Gladyshev (Harvard) publish universal mammalian aging clocks
description: Universal biological aging markers shared across mammalian species provide screening framework for interventions in mice rapidly translating to humans.

title: AstraZeneca tozorakimab Phase III MIRANDA COPD primary endpoint hit
description: AstraZeneca anti-IL-33 antibody tozorakimab met Phase III MIRANDA COPD primary endpoint — validates IL-33/ST2 inflammaging axis in major geriatric respiratory disease.

title: Purovitalis: 12 Most Studied Longevity Supplements in 2026
description: Updated 2026 supplement review covers NMN/NAD+ precursors, quercetin senolytic, rapamycin debates, and other geroprotector candidates — useful protocol-layer consumer-facing reference.

title: Maximon Marc Bernegger panel at Life Summit Berlin: scaling longevity from early adoption to broad health
description: Maximon co-founder Marc P. Bernegger discussed scaling longevity from early adoption to broad scientifically-backed health solutions at Life Summit Berlin alongside Michael Schummert, Filippo Nigro, Paolo Pio.

title: NY Tech Week AI x Longevity Summit lineup announced
description: AI x Longevity Summit lineup announced as part of NY Tech Week — signals continued mainstream tech-industry integration with longevity programming.
